description: The hospital is launching a telemedicine program. As the IT administrator, you need to configure a new visit type in the OpenMRS system so that front-desk staff can properly categorize remote patient encounters. Create a new visit type named 'Telehealth Consultation' with the description 'Remote patient consultation conducted via video or phone call'. Access the OpenMRS administration interface at https://localhost/openmrs/admin using username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'. Note: This is the OpenMRS backend administration interface, not the Bahmni clinical frontend.

metadata.target_description: Remote patient consultation conducted via video or phone call
